name: skillkit-marketplace
description: Professional skill creation with TDD workflow and behavioral validation. Includes dual-mode (fast/full), pressure testing, and quality gates.

metadata.description: Skillkit v2.1 introduces Full Mode Behavioral Testing Protocol with TDD-style RED-GREEN-REFACTOR cycle, deprecates legacy pressure_tester.py in favor of subagent-based pressure testing.

plugins.name: skillkit-core
plugins.description: Professional skill and subagent creation with dual-mode workflow: 12-step fast mode and 15-step full mode with behavioral pressure testing and TDD integration.

plugins.name: skillkit-essentials
plugins.description: Essential skills for everyday development: beginner-friendly explanations (baby-education), comprehensive README creation (readme-expert), LLM prompt optimization (prompt-engineering), AI-to-human doc transformation (humanize-docs), technical spec creation (quick-spec), pre-deployment QA checklisting (pre-deploy-checklist), and developer progress logging (been-there-done-that).

plugins.name: skillkit-frameworks
plugins.description: Agent capability frameworks: STAR framework for understanding implicit intent (framework-initiative), critical thinking architecture with reasoning selection (framework-critical-thinking), and adversarial review protocol with mandatory bug quota (adversarial-review). Build smarter, self-correcting agents and validate plans before execution.

plugins.name: skillkit-creative
plugins.description: Content creation powerhouse: viral thread generation (thread-pro), storytelling (storyteller), screenwriting (screenwriter), creative copywriting with databases (creative-copywriting), image prompt optimization (imagine), and high-diversity content generation (diverse-content-gen).

plugins.name: skillkit-social-media
plugins.description: Social media SEO optimization with 2025-proven strategies. Includes comprehensive CSV databases with 100+ caption formulas, thread structures, viral patterns, and platform-specific playbooks for Instagram, X/Twitter, and Threads.

plugins.name: skillkit-subagents
plugins.description: Specialized subagent collection: Creative copywriter with psychology triggers, SEO manager with proven formulas, decision-making agents (velocity-first Sam Altman, safety-first Dario Amodei), Kotlin expert, doc simplifier, and comprehensive red team security agent.

plugins.name: red-teaming
plugins.description: Comprehensive red teaming methodology for both cybersecurity (MITRE ATT&CK, pentesting) and AI/LLM systems (prompt injection, jailbreaking, OWASP Top 10 LLM). Includes threat modeling, attack simulation, compliance validation (NIST, EU AI Act), and progressive attack technique references.
